title: The History of Don Quixote, Volume 2, Part 21
summaries: "The History of Don Quixote, Volume 2, Part 21" by Miguel de Cervantes Saavedra is part of a novel originally published in two parts in 1605 and 1615. The story follows Alonso Quijano, a man driven mad by chivalric romances who becomes the knight-errant Don Quixote. Accompanied by his earthy squire Sancho Panza, he embarks on adventures where fantasy collides with reality. As their journey unfolds, Don Quixote descends from illusion toward reality while Sancho ascends from reality toward illusion, creating a transformative dynamic between master and servant. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
subjects: Spain -- Social life and customs -- 16th century -- Fiction
